title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on climate change and global responsibility.

questions.question: Do you think individual actions can really make a difference to climate change, or does change mainly need to come from governments and companies?
Should wealthier countries do more to help poorer countries deal with the effects of climate change?
Some people say it is already too late to reverse the damage done to the environment. Do you agree, or do you think it is still possible to make a difference?

script.text: Do you think individual actions can really make a difference to climate change, or does change mainly need to come from governments and companies?
Should wealthier countries do more to help poorer countries deal with the effects of climate change?
Some people say it is already too late to reverse the damage done to the environment. Do you agree, or do you think it is still possible to make a difference?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
